title: melica persica subsp. inaequiglumis
intro: Melica persica subsp. inaequiglumis is a plant species that belongs to the genus Melica, commonly known as wood melick. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Melica persica subsp. inaequiglumis include its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which help to soothe irritated airways and promote the removal of mucus. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions and decoctions, which can be consumed as teas to harness its medicinal benefits.
